# Youth & Soul

> The Longevity & Health Marketplace — doctor-prescribed telehealth programs (GLP-1, HRT, peptides, hair, skin, mental health), curated supplements, and exclusive brand discount codes. No membership or hidden fees; full refund if a clinician doesn't approve your program.

Youth & Soul connects patients in the US with licensed clinicians (via the OpenLoop network) for fast, transparent telehealth care. Patients complete a 5-minute intake, a clinician reviews within 24 hours, and approved medications ship to the door. Pricing is upfront — programs start from a published "From $X/mo" rate with no subscription lock-in.

## Core pages

- [Home](/): Overview of programs, products, and how Youth & Soul works.
- [About](/about): Mission, founder (Jo Ankier), and the anti-AI-fabrication ethics policy.
- [Contact](/contact): Customer support and partnership inquiries.
- [Learn](/learn): Editorial guides on longevity, GLP-1, HRT, peptides, and healthspan.
- [Explore](/explore): Community, podcasts, weekly rankings, and influencer content.
- [Search](/search): AI-powered product and program search.

## Telehealth programs

- [GLP-1 Weight Loss](/glp-weightloss): Semaglutide and Tirzepatide programs with 24-hour clinician review.
- [Weight Loss](/programs/weight-loss): Full weight-loss program hub.
- [Menopause & HRT](/programs/menopause-hrt): Hormone replacement therapy with female clinicians.
- [Sexual Health](/programs/sexual-health): ED, libido, and intimate wellness programs.
- [Skin & Hair](/programs/skin-hair): Dermatology, hair loss, and aesthetic treatments.
- [Longevity](/programs/longevity): NAD+, Sermorelin, Methylene Blue, and anti-aging peptides.
- [Pain & Recovery](/programs/pain-recovery): Recovery peptides and pain management.
- [Brain & Cognitive](/programs/brain-cognitive): Nootropics and cognitive performance.
- [Gut Health](/programs/gut-health): Microbiome and digestive support.
- [Mental Health](/programs/mental-health): Therapy and psychiatric care.
- [Sleep Health](/programs/sleep-health): CBT-I and sleep optimization.
- [Peptides](/peptides): Peptide catalog for weight loss, recovery, hormones, and brain health.

## Health quizzes

- [Weight Loss Quiz](/health-quiz/weight-loss): Find the right GLP-1 or weight-loss path.
- [Menopause Quiz](/health-quiz/menopause): Match HRT options to your symptoms.
- [Sexual Health Quiz](/health-quiz/sexual-health): Tailored sexual wellness recommendations.
- [Skin & Hair Quiz](/health-quiz/skin-hair): Personalized skin and hair regimens.
- [Longevity Quiz](/health-quiz/longevity): Build a longevity stack.
- [Brain Quiz](/health-quiz/brain-cognitive): Cognitive support recommendations.
- [Sleep Quiz](/health-quiz/sleep-health): Sleep program matching.

## Trust & safety

- [GLP-1 Safety Info](/safety-info/glp1): Comprehensive clinical safety data for GLP-1 medications.
- [Insurance Access](/insurance-access): Insurance coverage options for telehealth care.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How we handle patient data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Platform terms.

## For partners

- [Apply as Influencer](/apply-influencer): Partner program for creators with 20k+ followers.
- [Earn as Affiliate](/earn-affiliate): Affiliate marketing program.
- [List a Product](/list-product): Brand seller onboarding (US-only, GMP/NSF required).
- [Apply as Consultant](/apply-consultant): Clinician and expert applications.
